item.title: mne-tools/mne-cpp
item.description: MNE-CPP: The C++ framework for real-time functional brain imaging.

item.title: cibr-jyu/meggie
item.description: User-friendly MNE-python based graphical user interface to do MEG and EEG analysis with multiple subjects

item.title: OHBA-analysis/osl-ephys
item.description: Electrophysiological Data Analysis Toolbox.

item.title: trendscenter/fit
item.description: Fusion ICA Toolbox (MATLAB)

item.title: spm/spm-docs
item.description: SPM Documentation

item.title: zensation-ai/zenbrain
item.description: Neuroscience-inspired memory system for AI agents. 7 layers. FSRS. Hebbian learning. Emotional tagging.

item.title: sync2brain/bossdevice-api-matlab
item.description: sync2brain's bossdevice RESEARCH Application Programmable Interface (API) for MATLAB

item.title: mne-tools/mne-lsl
item.description: A framework for real-time brain signal streaming with MNE-Python.

item.title: AxonOS-BCI/axonos-community-radar
item.description: AxonOS Radar — a living, auto-updated map of the open brain-computer-interface field. An AxonOS community project.

item.title: fooof-tools/fooof
item.description: Parameterizing neural power spectra into periodic & aperiodic components.

item.title: analyticalmonk/awesome-neuroscience
item.description: A curated list of awesome neuroscience libraries, software and any content related to the domain.

item.title: PerlinWarp/pyomyo
item.description: PyoMyo - Python Opensource Myo armband library

item.title: wzpan/wukong-robot
item.description: 🤖 wukong-robot 是一个简单、灵活、优雅的中文语音对话机器人/智能音箱项目，支持ChatGPT多轮对话能力，还可能是首个支持脑机交互的开源智能音箱项目。

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-kernel
item.description: Hard real-time Rust microkernel for brain-computer interfaces. #![no_std] on Cortex-M, EDF scheduling with Kani-verified WCRT bounds, zero-copy intent path, capability-based privacy by construction. ABI v1 — tandem with axonos-sdk.

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-signal-pipeline
item.description: Deterministic, vector-pinned BCI signal pipeline for AxonOS: raw acquisition frame -> typed, consent-bound decision. no_std, zero-deps, unsafe-free, fixed-point. Engineering demonstrator, not a medical device.

item.title: AxonOS-org/axonos-standard
item.description: Canonical technical standard and architecture manual for AxonOS: deterministic BCI software, neural permissions, consent, validation, and governance.

item.title: NeuroSkill-com/skill
item.description: NeuroSkill™ — State of Mind Brain-Computer Interface system

item.title: cbrnr/sigviewer
item.description: A viewing application for biosignals

item.title: openmeeg/openmeeg
item.description: A C++ package for low-frequency bio-electromagnetism solving forward problems in the field of EEG and MEG.

item.title: cortex-lab/phy
item.description: phy: interactive visualization and manual spike sorting of large-scale ephys data

item.title: GWeindel/hmp
item.description: Repository for the hmp python package

item.title: CAMBI-tech/BciPy
item.description: Python Brain-Computer Interface Software

item.title: sccn/eegprep
item.description: EEGPrep is an automated preprocessing tool for human EEG data built on a benchmarked EEGLAB pipeline

item.title: Gabrock94/Pysiology
item.description: A Python package for physyological's signals processing

item.title: beacon-biosignals/PyMNE.jl
item.description: Julia interface to MNE-Python via PythonCall

item.title: neurotuning/gedai
item.description: GEDAI in python
